title: Decidability Results for Fragments of First-Order Logic via a Symbolic Model Property
abstract: Recently, symbolic structures were proposed as finite representations of potentially infinite first-order structures, where Linear Integer Arithmetic terms and formulas define the domain and interpretations of a structure. We generalize symbolic structures to use any base theory that admits a standard model. Symbolic structures induce a symbolic model property, which holds for a fragment of first-order logic if every satisfiable formula in the fragment has a symbolic model. The symbolic model property implies decidability, since the model-checking problem for symbolic structures is decidable. We use the symbolic model property to prove decidability for several fragments that extend the fragment of stratified formulas, relaxing the quantifier-alternation constraints by allowing one sort to have self-looping functions, under certain restrictions. To establish the symbolic model property for these fragments we construct a symbolic model for a formula from an arbitrary model. The construction and its correctness are proved in a generic fashion, which may be instantiated to other similarly restricted fragments.
title_zh: 基于符号模型性质的一阶逻辑片段的可判定性结果
abstract_zh: 最近，符号结构被提出作为潜在无限的一阶结构的有限表示，其中线性整数算术项和公式用于定义结构的域及其解释。我们将符号结构推广到使用任何具有标准模型的基底理论。符号结构引出了一种“符号模型性质”：若某个一阶逻辑片段中的每个可满足公式都存在一个符号模型，则该片段具有符号模型性质。这种性质蕴含可判定性，因为符号结构上的模型检测问题是可判定的。我们利用符号模型性质证明了若干片段的可判定性，这些片段扩展了分层公式片段，通过在一定限制下允许某一排序包含自循环函数，从而放宽了量词交替的约束。为了在这些片段上建立符号模型性质，我们从任意模型出发为公式构造一个符号模型。该构造方法及其正确性以通用方式给出，因此可实例化应用于其他具有类似限制的片段。

title: ReasonSTL: Bridging Natural Language and Signal Temporal Logic via Tool-Augmented Process-Rewarded Learning
authors: Bowen Ye, Zhijian Li, Junyue Huang, Junkai Ma, Xiang Yin
abstract: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is an expressive formal language for specifying spatio-temporal requirements over real-valued, real-time signals. It has been widely used for the verification and synthesis of autonomous systems and cyber-physical systems. In practice, however, users often express their requirements in natural language rather than in structured STL formulas, making natural-language-to-STL translation a critical yet challenging task. Manual specification requires temporal-logic expertise and cannot scale, while prompting commercial LLM APIs incurs substantial token costs and may expose sensitive system requirements to third-party services, raising privacy concerns for industrial deployment. To address these challenges, we present \textsc{ReasonSTL}, a tool-augmented framework that adapts local open-source language models for natural-language-to-STL generation. \textsc{ReasonSTL} decomposes the translation process into explicit reasoning, deterministic tool calls, and structured formula construction. We further introduce process-rewarded training to supervise both tool-use trajectories and final formulas, together with \textsc{STL-Bench}, a bilingual, computation-aware benchmark grounded in real-world signals. Experiments show that a 4B model trained with \textsc{ReasonSTL} achieves state-of-the-art performance in both automatic metrics and human evaluations, demonstrating that \textsc{ReasonSTL} provides a transparent, low-cost, and privacy-preserving alternative for formal specification drafting.
title_zh: ReasonSTL：通过工具增强的过程奖励学习连接自然语言与信号时序逻辑
abstract_zh: 信号时序逻辑（Signal Temporal Logic, STL）是一种用于描述实值、实时信号上时空特性的表达能力强的形式化语言，已广泛应用于自主系统和信息物理系统的验证与综合。然而在实际中，用户通常以自然语言而非结构化的STL公式来表达其需求，这使得自然语言到STL的翻译成为一项关键但具有挑战性的任务。人工编写STL规范需要掌握时序逻辑专业知识，难以规模化；而调用商业大语言模型（LLM）API则会产生高昂的token开销，并可能将敏感的系统需求暴露给第三方服务，引发工业部署中的隐私问题。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了\textsc{ReasonSTL}——一种工具增强型框架，用于适配本地开源语言模型以实现自然语言到STL的生成。\textsc{ReasonSTL}将翻译过程分解为显式推理、确定性工具调用和结构化公式的构建。我们进一步提出过程奖励训练方法，用于监督工具使用路径和最终公式的生成，并构建了\textsc{STL-Bench}——一个基于真实世界信号、具备计算感知能力的双语评测基准。实验结果表明，使用\textsc{ReasonSTL}训练的40亿参数模型在自动指标和人工评估中均达到了最先进的性能，证明\textsc{ReasonSTL}为形式化规范撰写提供了一种透明、低成本且保护隐私的替代方案。

title: Knowledge Graphs, the Missing Link in Agentic AI-based Formal Verification
authors: Vaisakh Naduvodi Viswambharan, Keerthan Kopparam Radhakrishna, Deepak Narayan Gadde, Aman Kumar
abstract: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled workflows that generate SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) from natural-language specifications, with the potential to accelerate Formal Verification (FV). However, high-quality assertion synthesis remains challenging because specifications are often ambiguous or incomplete and critical micro-architectural details reside in the Register Transfer Level (RTL). Many existing approaches treat the specification and RTL as loosely structured text, which weakens specification-to-RTL grounding and leads to semantic mismatches and frequent syntax failures during formal parsing and elaboration. This work addresses these limitations with a verification-centric Knowledge Graph (KG) constructed from structured Intermediate Representations (IRs) extracted from the specification, RTL, and formal-tool feedback, including syntax diagnostics, Counterexamples (CEXs), and coverage reports. The KG links requirements, design hierarchy, signals, assumptions, and properties to provide traceable, design-grounded context for generation. A multi-agent workflow queries and updates this KG to generate SVAs and to drive three refinement loops: syntax repair guided by tool diagnostics, CEX-guided correction using trace links, and coverage-directed property augmentation. Evaluation across seven benchmark designs indicates that KG-based context retrieval improves specification-to-RTL grounding and consistently produces compilable SVAs with low syntax-repair overhead. The approach achieves formal coverage ranging from 78.5% to 99.4%, though convergence exhibits design dependence with complex temporal and arithmetic reasoning remaining challenging for current LLM capabilities.
title_zh: 知识图谱：基于智能体的AI形式化验证中缺失的一环
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的最新进展使得能够通过自然语言规范生成SystemVerilog断言（SVA），从而有望加速形式化验证（FV）流程。然而，高质量的断言综合仍然面临挑战，因为自然语言规范往往存在歧义或不完整，而关键的微架构细节则存在于寄存器传输级（RTL）设计中。许多现有方法将规范和RTL视为松散结构的文本，这削弱了规范与RTL之间的关联性，导致在形式化解析和展开过程中出现语义不匹配以及频繁的语法错误。为解决这些问题，本文提出一种以验证为中心的知识图谱（KG），该图谱基于从规范、RTL以及形式化工具反馈（包括语法诊断信息、反例（CEX）和覆盖率报告）中提取的结构化中间表示（IR）构建而成。该知识图谱将需求、设计层次结构、信号、假设和属性相互关联，为断言生成提供可追溯且基于设计上下文的信息支持。通过一个多智能体工作流对KG进行查询与更新，实现SVA生成，并驱动三个优化循环：基于工具诊断信息的语法修复、利用追踪链接的反例引导修正，以及面向覆盖率的属性增强。在七个基准设计上的评估结果表明，基于KG的上下文检索显著增强了规范与RTL之间的语义对齐，能够持续生成可编译的SVA，且语法修复开销较低。该方法实现的形式化覆盖率达到78.5%至99.4%，但其收敛性依赖于具体设计，对于涉及复杂时序逻辑和算术推理的场景，当前LLM的能力仍面临挑战。

title: A Quantum SMT Solver for Bit-Vector Theory
authors: Shang-Wei Lin, Si-Han Chen, Lei-Han Yao, Yu-Chung Chen, Yean-Ru Chen
publish: 2026 International Conference on Quantum Communications, Networking, and Computing (QCNC)
abstract: Satisfiability modulo theory (SMT), a problem of determining the satisfiability of a first-order formula with respect to a decidable first-order theory, has a wide range of applications because of its powerful ability of problem encoding, including formal verification and optimization workflows in both classical and quantum domains. Given an SMT formula <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$F$</tex>, the classical lazy approach for SMT solving tries to (1) abstract <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$F$</tex> to a Boolean formula <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$F_{B}$</tex>, (2) find a Boolean solution to <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$F_{B}$</tex>, and (3) check whether the Boolean solution is consistent with the theory. If the solution found in the Boolean domain is not consistent with that in the theory domain, the SMT solver needs to perform steps (2) and (3) back and forth until a consistent solution is found between the theory and Boolean domains. This classical approach becomes unscalable when the search space is huge. In this work, we develop the first Grover–based quantum SMT solver to solve formulas on the theory of bit-vectors. With the characteristic of superposition in quantum computing, the proposed SMT solver is able to consider all the possible inputs simultaneously and check their consistency between the theory and Boolean domains in one shot, which brings significant speed-up for SMT solving.
title_zh: 一种用于位向量理论的量子SMT求解器
abstract_zh: 可满足性模理论（Satisfiability Modulo Theories, SMT）是指判断一阶公式在某个可判定一阶理论下的可满足性问题，因其强大的问题编码能力而在诸多领域有广泛应用，包括经典和量子领域的形式化验证与优化流程。对于给定的SMT公式 $F$，经典的惰性（lazy）SMT求解方法通常包括以下步骤：(1) 将 $F$ 抽象为一个布尔公式 $F_B$；(2) 求解 $F_B$ 的布尔解；(3) 检查该布尔解在相应理论下是否一致。如果在布尔域中找到的解与理论域不一致，SMT求解器需要反复执行步骤(2)和(3)，直到在理论域与布尔域之间找到一个一致的解。当搜索空间非常庞大时，这种经典方法会面临难以扩展的问题。在本研究中，我们开发了首个基于Grover量子算法的SMT求解器，用于求解位向量理论上的公式。得益于量子计算中的叠加特性，所提出的SMT求解器能够同时考虑所有可能的输入，并在一次操作中检查它们在理论域与布尔域之间的一致性，从而为SMT求解带来了显著的加速效果。

title: In-Situ Hardware Error Detection Using Specification-Derived Petri Net Models and Behavior-Derived State Sequences
authors: Tomonari Tanaka, Takumi Uezono, Kohei Suenaga, Masanori Hashimoto
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: In hardware accelerators used in data centers and safety-critical applications, soft errors and resultant silent data corruption significantly compromise reliability, particularly when upsets occur in control-flow operations, leading to severe failures. To address this issue, we introduce two methods for monitoring control flows: a method using specification-derived Petri nets and a method using behavior-derived state transitions, targeting applications where the control flow is independent of the datapath, with the assumption of manageable operation patterns. We validated our method across four designs: convolutional layer operation, Gaussian blur, AES encryption, and a router in Network-on-Chip. Our fault injection campaign targeting the control registers and primary control inputs demonstrated high error detection rates in both datapath and control logic. Synthesis results show that a maximum detection rate is achieved with a few to around 10% area overhead in most cases. The proposed detectors quickly detect 48% to 100% of failures resulting from upsets in internal control registers and perturbations in primary control inputs. The two proposed methods were compared in terms of area overhead and error detection rate. By selectively applying these two methods, a wide range of area constraints can be accommodated, enabling practical implementation and effectively enhancing error detection capabilities.
title_zh: 基于规范推导的Petri网模型与行为推导状态序列的硬件现场错误检测
abstract_zh: 在用于数据中心和安全关键应用的硬件加速器中，软错误及其导致的静默数据损坏会严重损害系统的可靠性，尤其是当控制流操作发生异常时，可能引发严重的故障。为解决这一问题，我们提出了两种监控控制流的方法：一种是基于规范推导的Petri网方法，另一种是基于行为推导的状态转换方法，适用于控制流与数据路径相互独立、且操作模式可管理的应用场景。我们在四种设计上验证了所提出的方法：卷积层运算、高斯模糊、AES加密以及片上网络中的路由器。针对控制寄存器和主控制输入的故障注入实验表明，这两种方法在数据路径和控制逻辑中均实现了较高的错误检测率。综合结果显示，在大多数情况下，仅需增加几个门到约10%的面积开销，即可达到最高的检测率。所提出的检测器能够快速检测由内部控制寄存器异常和主控制输入扰动所引发的48%至100%的故障。本文还从面积开销和错误检测率两个方面对这两种方法进行了比较。通过有选择地结合使用这两种方法，可以适应广泛的面积约束，从而实现实际部署，并有效增强系统的错误检测能力。

title: Accuracy-Adaptive Speedup of Indirect Optimization Heuristics
abstract: This paper addresses a key limitation in simulation-based optimization, where metaheuristics such as simulated annealing (SA) spend excessive time on computationally expensive simulations. We introduce an accuracy-adaptive approach AA-SA that links the simulation part stronger to the SA metaheuristic. Our methodology controls the simulation’s accuracy directly within the SA loop. The search begins with fast simulations to efficiently explore the design space. Simulation accuracy is systematically increased with the convergence process of the SA heuristic. This improves the trade-off between speed and accuracy for simulation-based SA, as simulation cost grows quadratically for a smaller relative error. We further contribute a theoretical model that predicts the speedup achievable by this approach and demonstrate its use with an M/M/1 queue optimization problem. The results confirm that our method achieves significant computational savings while largely preserving the quality of the final solution.
title_zh: 准确率自适应的间接优化启发式方法加速
abstract_zh: 本文针对基于仿真的优化中存在的一个关键局限性展开研究，即模拟退火（SA）等元启发式算法在计算成本高昂的仿真上耗费过多时间。我们提出一种精度自适应方法AA-SA，将仿真部分与SA元启发式更紧密地结合。该方法在SA循环内部直接控制仿真的精度：搜索初期采用快速仿真以高效探索设计空间，并随着SA算法的收敛过程系统性地提高仿真精度。这种方法改善了基于仿真的SA在速度与精度之间的权衡，因为仿真成本随相对误差减小呈平方级增长。我们进一步提出了一个理论模型，用于预测该方法可实现的加速效果，并通过M/M/1排队系统的优化问题展示了其应用。实验结果证实，所提方法在基本保持最终解质量的同时，显著降低了计算开销。

title: A Systems Engineering Approach to a Wearable Assistive Monitoring Device for Dementia Patients
abstract: Dementia conditions like Alzheimer’s disease increase the risk of falls and medication non-adherence significantly, hence creating a continuous safety challenge for patients and caregivers in home-based care environments. Even though wearable assistive technologies have been put forward to lessen these risks, many of them place emphasis on device-level functionality and algorithmic performance, without deep consideration of system-level design and verification, as well as lifecycle traceability. This paper presents a systems engineering approach to the design and validation of a wearable assistive monitoring device for patients with dementia. The proposed system combines fall detection and emergency localization with medication reminder functionalities all within a deterministic finite state machine (FSM) architecture to guarantee a predictable and verifiable system behavior. System requirements are deduced formally from the safety needs of dementia patients alongside safety-critical design principles. This is followed by a modular architectural decomposition which encompasses sensing, decision, and control, human interaction, communication, and energy subsystems. A twostage computation based on a threshold fall detection algorithm combining signal magnitude vector analysis with postural confirmation through tilt angle computation is conducted to reduce false positives while also maintaining deterministic decision-making. Verification and validation are done through high-accuracy simulation to produce quantitative performance metrics before the physical hardware can be implemented. The results display deterministic state changes, bounded detection latency, and correct sequencing of emergency localization and communication actions. A requirements-to-results traceability framework is used to support early-stage system validation. The results provide initial evidence of system feasibility and safety and establish a structured foundation for subsequent physical prototyping and real-world evaluation.
title_zh: 面向痴呆症患者的可穿戴辅助监测设备的系统工程方法
abstract_zh: 痴呆症（如阿尔茨海默病）会显著增加患者跌倒和不遵从用药的风险，因此在居家照护环境中给患者及其照护者带来了持续的安全挑战。尽管已有可穿戴辅助技术被提出以降低这些风险，但其中许多技术侧重于设备层面的功能和算法性能，而缺乏对系统级设计与验证以及全生命周期可追溯性的深入考虑。本文提出一种基于系统工程的方法，用于为痴呆症患者设计和验证一款可穿戴式辅助监测设备。该系统采用确定性有限状态机（FSM）架构，集成了跌倒检测、紧急定位和用药提醒功能，以确保系统行为的可预测性和可验证性。系统需求从痴呆症患者的安全需求及安全关键设计原则出发，经过形式化推导得出。随后进行模块化的架构分解，涵盖传感、决策与控制、人机交互、通信和能源等子系统。为减少误报并保持确定性决策，采用两阶段计算方法：结合信号幅值向量分析与通过倾斜角计算实现的体位确认，实施基于阈值的跌倒检测算法。在物理硬件实现之前，通过高精度仿真完成系统的验证与确认，生成定量的性能指标。结果表明系统具有确定的状态转换、有界的检测延迟，以及紧急定位与通信动作的正确时序。同时采用从需求到结果的可追溯性框架，支持早期阶段的系统验证。研究结果初步证明了该系统的可行性与安全性，为后续的物理原型开发和实际环境评估奠定了结构化的基础。

title: Formal Verification of Line-Following Robot Control Using Linear Temporal Logic
authors: Md Khurram Monir Rabby, Md. Fahad Jubayer, Asiful Islam Bhuiyan, Zakaria Mahmud
publish: 2025 IEEE 4th International Conference on Robotics, Automation, Artificial-Intelligence and Internet-of-Things (RAAICON)
abstract: This paper addresses the challenge of ensuring formally verified behaviors in autonomous line-following robots by integrating Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) with sensor-based control. A control synthesis methodology is proposed that transforms temporal logic specifications into executable control strategies for differential drive robots. The approach utilizes an observation map that converts continuous sensor readings into discrete propositions, allowing real-time evaluation of LTL formulas. The implementation features a dual-mode simulation environment, supporting both physics-based dynamic simulation and simplified kinematic analysis. Key contributions include: a formal problem formulation for temporal logic-based line following, a control framework that guaranties satisfaction of complex temporal specifications, and validation demonstrating robust performance under the given track configurations. The results show that the proposed method maintains the accuracy of the tracking while providing formal guaranties for recovery behaviors that meet specifications such as coverage and sequencing requirements. In this work, the integration of formal methods with robot control allows a foundation for developing autonomous systems with verifiable safety and performance characteristics.
title_zh: 基于线性时序逻辑的循迹机器人控制形式化验证
abstract_zh: 本文针对自主循线机器人中确保形式化验证行为的挑战，提出了一种将线性时序逻辑（LTL）与基于传感器的控制相融合的方法。所提出的控制综合方法能够将时序逻辑规范转化为差动驱动机器人的可执行控制策略。该方法利用一种观测映射机制，将连续的传感器读数转换为离散命题，从而实现对LTL公式的实时评估。系统实现包含一个双模式仿真环境，支持基于物理的动力学仿真以及简化的运动学分析。本文的主要贡献包括：针对基于时序逻辑的循线问题提出了形式化的建模方法；构建了一个能够保证满足复杂时序规范要求的控制框架；并通过实验验证了在给定轨道配置下系统的鲁棒性能。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在保持轨迹跟踪精度的同时，为满足覆盖性和顺序性等规范要求的恢复行为提供了形式化保障。本研究通过将形式化方法与机器人控制相结合，为开发具有可验证安全性与性能特征的自主系统奠定了基础。

title: Modeling Energy-Performance-Aware IoT Networks Using Hierarchical Colored Petri Nets
authors: Diogo Lages, Marcos Falcão, Andson Balieiro, Jamilson Dantas, Dalton Valadares
abstract: Modern Internet of Things (IoT) networks comprise a vast number of interconnected devices capable of seamless communication and cooperation, thereby enhancing the intelligence and efficiency of different environments. They are growing in scale and complexity, making it difficult to assess energy-performance trade-offs before deployment. Yet robust pre-deployment evaluation is critical to ensure energy efficiency and compliance with performance requirements. To address this challenge, we introduce a hierarchical Colored Petri Net (CPN) formal model that jointly captures both device-level energy usage and network performance metrics. The proposed model integrates CPU power states, transceiver operations, communication delays, and unreliable channel conditions into a unified framework. Key innovations include support for heterogeneous CPU architectures and multiple transceivers per node, bidirectional communication, and fine-grained interactions between CPU and transceiver components. This fine-grained formal approach enables combined evaluation of energy consumption and throughput under realistic conditions before physical implementation. We validate the model against real hardware, comprising an ARM7TDMI CPU and an SX1278 LoRa transceiver, demonstrating high accuracy with relative errors below $0.4 \%$ for CPU energy, under 2% for transceiver energy, and near-zero for throughput. These results highlight the model’s accuracy and practical relevance. Overall, the work contributes a unified, modular, and formally verifiable modeling framework to enhance energy-performance analysis for complex, realistic IoT systems.
title_zh: 使用分层着色Petri网对能量-性能感知的物联网网络进行建模
abstract_zh: 现代物联网（IoT）网络由大量相互连接的设备组成，能够实现无缝通信与协作，从而提升各种环境的智能化水平和运行效率。随着规模和复杂性的不断增长，在部署前评估系统的能耗与性能权衡变得愈发困难。然而，可靠的部署前评估对于确保能源效率并满足性能要求至关重要。为应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种分层的有色Petri网（Colored Petri Net, CPN）形式化模型，该模型能够同时刻画设备级能耗和网络性能指标。所提出的模型将CPU的电源状态、收发器操作、通信延迟以及不可靠的信道条件统一整合到一个框架中。其关键创新包括：支持异构的CPU架构、每个节点配备多个收发器、双向通信机制，以及CPU与收发器组件之间的细粒度交互。这种细粒度的形式化方法能够在实际部署前，在真实条件下联合评估系统的能耗与吞吐量。我们通过基于ARM7TDMI CPU和SX1278 LoRa收发器的实际硬件对模型进行了验证，结果表明该模型具有很高的准确性：CPU能耗的相对误差低于0.4%，收发器能耗误差小于2%，吞吐量误差接近于零。这些结果凸显了模型的精确性与实际应用价值。总体而言，本研究提供了一个统一、模块化且可形式化验证的建模框架，有助于提升复杂而真实物联网系统在能耗与性能方面的分析能力。

title: Change-Aware Test Suite Prioritization for CPS using Multi-Domain Dependency Graphs
authors: Maximilian Beck, Jonas Boll, Vitus Lüntzel, Eric Sax
abstract: Cyber-Physical Systems integrate mechanical, electrical, and software components, resulting in tightly coupled development processes and extensive regression-testing demands. As agile and over-the-air update strategies increase the number of system versions, executing full regression test suites becomes infeasible due to resource and time constraints. Existing test case prioritization techniques, developed largely within the software domain, do not account for cross-domain dependencies and therefore overlook faults that arise only through interactions between heterogeneous engineering artifacts. This work presents a change-aware, cross-domain test case prioritization method that builds on Multi-Domain Dependency Graphs (MDDGs) as a unified representation of CPS. By propagating modifications via graph-based relations across all engineering domains, change impact is estimated and used to derive execution orders that reflect the system’s structural and semantic dependencies. The approach is instantiated via a set of graph-based metrics that score test cases along paths connecting changed artifacts and test-relevant elements. A modular implementation with interfaces to existing engineering tools enables integration into modelbased development environments without requiring changes to underlying domain-specific models. The method is evaluated in representative scenarios from an embedded vehicle platform. Across different datasets, the approach achieves Average Percentage of Faults Detected (APFD) values between 60% and 90%, exceeding the 50% expected from random test ordering, indicating improved fault detection relative to random test execution while preserving the full test suite and thus avoiding coverage losses associated with minimization techniques.
title_zh: 基于多领域依赖图的面向信息物理系统变更感知测试套件优先级排序
abstract_zh:
信息物理系统（Cyber-Physical Systems, CPS）融合了机械、电气和软件组件，导致开发过程高度耦合，并带来大量的回归测试需求。随着敏捷开发和空中升级（over-the-air update）策略的广泛应用，系统版本数量显著增加，在资源和时间受限的情况下，执行完整的回归测试套件变得不可行。现有的测试用例优先级排序技术主要针对纯软件领域设计，未能考虑跨领域依赖关系，因此容易忽略由异构工程构件之间交互所引发的故障。

本文提出了一种面向变更、跨越多领域的测试用例优先级排序方法，该方法基于“多领域依赖图”（Multi-Domain Dependency Graphs, MDDGs），将CPS各组成部分统一建模为一个集成化的图结构表示。通过在图中沿各工程领域之间的关联关系传播变更信息，评估变更影响范围，并据此生成反映系统结构与语义依赖关系的测试执行顺序。该方法通过一组基于图的度量指标实现，这些指标沿着连接已变更构件与测试相关元素的路径对测试用例进行评分，从而确定其优先级。

本方法采用模块化设计，并提供与现有工程工具的接口，可在不修改底层领域专用模型的前提下，无缝集成到基于模型的开发环境中。该方法在嵌入式车载平台的代表性场景中进行了评估。在多个数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法的平均故障检出率百分比（Average Percentage of Faults Detected, APFD）介于60%至90%之间，显著高于随机测试排序预期的50%，说明其在不削减测试用例数量（从而避免覆盖率损失）的前提下，相比随机执行能更早地发现更多故障，优于传统的测试最小化技术。

title: Bottom-Up Generation of Verilog Designs for Testing EDA Tools
authors: João Victor Amorim Vieira, Luiza de Melo Gomes, Rafael Sumitani, Raissa Maciel, Augusto Mafra, Mirlaine Crepalde, Fernando Magno Quintão Pereira
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Testing Electronic Design Automation (EDA) tools rely on benchmarks: designs written in Hardware Description Languages (HDLs) such as Verilog, SystemVerilog, or VHDL. Collections of benchmarks for these languages are typically limited in size. This scarcity has recently drawn more attention due to the increasing need for training large language models in this domain. To deal with such limitation, this paper presents a methodology and a corresponding tool for generating realistic Verilog designs. The tool, ChiGen, was originally developed to test the Jasper® Formal Verification Platform, a product by Cadence Design Systems. Now, released as open-source software, ChiGen has been able to identify zero-day bugs in a range of tools, including Verible, Verilator, and Yosys. This paper outlines the principles behind ChiGen’s design, focusing on three aspects of it: (i) generation guided by probabilistic grammars, (ii) type inference via the Hindley-Milner algorithm, and (iii) code injection enabled by data-flow analysis. Once deployed on standard hardware, ChiGen outperforms existing Verilog Fuzzers such as Verismith, TransFuzz, and VlogHammer regarding structural diversity, code coverage, and bug-finding ability.
title_zh: 用于测试 EDA 工具的 Verilog 设计自底向上生成
abstract_zh: 测试电子设计自动化（EDA）工具依赖于基准测试：即使用硬件描述语言（HDL）（如Verilog、SystemVerilog或VHDL）编写的电路设计。针对这些语言的基准测试集合通常规模有限。由于该领域对训练大型语言模型的需求日益增长，这一稀缺性问题最近受到更多关注。为应对这一限制，本文提出了一种生成逼真Verilog设计的方法及相应的工具。该工具ChiGen最初由Cadence Design Systems公司开发，用于测试其Jasper®形式化验证平台。如今作为开源软件发布后，ChiGen已成功在包括Verible、Verilator和Yosys在内的多种工具中发现了零日漏洞。本文阐述了ChiGen设计背后的核心原理，重点介绍其三个关键技术方面：（i）基于概率语法的生成机制，（ii）采用Hindley-Milner算法的类型推断，以及（iii）通过数据流分析实现的代码注入功能。在标准硬件上部署后，ChiGen在结构多样性、代码覆盖率和缺陷发现能力方面均优于现有的Verilog模糊测试工具，如Verismith、TransFuzz和VlogHammer。

title: Automated Derivation of Formal Properties from Requirements
authors: Bastien Sultan, Ludovic Apvrille, Pierre de Saqui-Sannes
abstract: Early detection of design errors in the life cycle of systems is one of the many benefits one may expect from using an model-based systems engineering approach. The formal verification of models is thus an issue. Among verification techniques, the paper focuses on model checking. Taking as input a set of properties and a model, model checking outputs a “yes/no” answer for each property saying whether the property is verified or not. The relevance of this proof relies on the relevance of the defined properties. The paper proposes solutions for automated generation of properties from a SysML model and, more specifically, from the requirements expressed in the SysML model. We introduce an AI- and syntactic rule-based process that assists systems engineers in the generation of syntactically correct CTL properties, along with complementary contributions for computing and propagating requirement coverage from formal verification results, backtracing them directly in the SysML requirement diagram. The approach is mathematically defined, with explanatory comments accompanying the formalism to support comprehension. The proposed approach is further implemented by the free software TTool-AI. The latter is an open source SysML toolkit extended with an LLM-based assistant. A satellite system and an embedded maritime system serve as case studies.
title_zh: 从需求中自动推导形式化属性
abstract_zh: 在系统生命周期中尽早发现设计错误，是采用基于模型的系统工程（MBSE）方法所能带来的诸多益处之一。因此，对模型进行形式化验证成为一个关键问题。在各种验证技术中，本文聚焦于模型检验（model checking）。模型检验以一组属性和一个模型作为输入，针对每条属性输出“是/否”判断，表明该属性是否得到满足。这种验证的有效性依赖于所定义属性的恰当性。本文提出了一种从SysML模型（特别是其中表达的需求）自动生成属性的解决方案。我们引入了一种基于人工智能（AI）和语法规则的方法，辅助系统工程师生成语法正确的CTL属性，并进一步提供了补充性贡献：根据形式化验证结果计算并传播需求覆盖率，并将结果直接追溯回SysML需求图中。该方法在数学上进行了严格定义，并辅以解释性注释以帮助理解。所提出的方法已通过开源软件TTool-AI实现，该工具是一个扩展了基于大语言模型（LLM）助手的开源SysML工具包。本文以卫星系统和嵌入式海事系统作为案例研究进行验证。

title: Security analysis of Precision Time Protocol v2.1 using TLA+
abstract: Modern power grid control technologies, such as synchrophasors, rely on precise time synchronization between machines for accurate control decisions. This is typically achieved through the Precision Time Protocol (PTP). The 2019 version of the protocol, PTPv2.1, includes an Authentication TLV that provides some integrity guarantees, but researchers have found design flaws, such as delay attacks or the ability to tamper with correction fields, that compromise the integrity of the time reference distribution.This paper describes a temporal logic model, built in TLA+, which can be used to analyze the security of PTPv2.1 with regards to both integrity and availability requirements. The different clocks are modeled as state machines, capabilities are modeled as state transitions, integrity requirements as modeled as invariants and availability requirements are modeled as temporal properties. If the execution of the model does not satisfy the temporal property where clocks are always eventually synchronized or fail to maintain the integrity invariants, a security problem has been found.Using the model, we confirm the findings from the other researchers but also identify the possibility of a replay attack which was not discussed in the literature previously, even through the replay protection mechanism provided by PTPv2.1. From the modeling, this new attack scenario is created if the sequence counter is reset after a clock loses its time source and a malicious clock replays messages from an authenticated time source and represents a new contribution to the security of PTP.
title_zh: 使用TLA+对精确时间协议2.1版的安全性分析
abstract_zh:
现代电网控制技术（如同步相量测量）依赖于设备间精确的时间同步，以实现准确的控制决策。这通常通过精密时间协议（PTP）来实现。2019年版本的协议PTPv2.1包含一种认证TLV（类型-长度-值字段），可提供一定程度的完整性保障。然而，研究人员已发现其设计缺陷，例如延迟攻击或篡改校正字段的能力，这些都会破坏时间参考分发的完整性。

本文提出了一种基于TLA+构建的时序逻辑模型，可用于分析PTPv2.1在完整性和可用性要求方面的安全性。该模型将不同的时钟建模为状态机，将攻击能力建模为状态转换，将完整性要求建模为不变式，将可用性要求建模为时序属性。如果模型执行过程中未能满足“时钟最终总是能够同步”的时序属性，或无法维持完整性不变式，则表明存在安全问题。

通过该模型，我们验证了先前研究人员的发现，同时还识别出一种此前文献中未讨论过的重放攻击可能性，即使PTPv2.1本身提供了重放保护机制。建模结果显示，当某个时钟在失去时间源后序列计数器被重置时，恶意时钟可重放来自已认证时间源的消息，从而实施新型攻击。这一发现为PTP协议的安全性研究提供了新的贡献。

title: A Formal Verification Approach for Measures of Effectiveness Based on Satisfiability Modulo Theories
authors: Yongji Yuan, Guoxin Wang, Yihui Gong, Jinzhi Lu, Shouxuan Wu, Mengru Dong
abstract: Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) provides a formal and integrated framework for managing multidisciplinary information throughout the system design lifecycle. Within this framework, Measures of Effectiveness (MOEs) serve as the key quantitative metrics for evaluating whether a system design meets mission requirements. Current approaches for verifying MOE constraints in MBSE typically rely on mathematical relationships established through SysML parametric diagrams, with metrics analysis performed using built-in computational plug-ins or external specialized software. However, these approaches face challenges in unified representation of multitheory hybrid constraints, automated exploration for feasible solutions, and tool-level data consistency. This limits the reliability and completeness of verification results. This paper proposes a formal verification approach for MOE by integrating the multi-architecture modeling language KARMA with Satisfiability Modulo Theories (SMT). The approach provides a unified firstorder logic (FOL) representation of MOE-related metrics. It also automates the evaluation of SysML parametric diagrams through SMT solver, enabling constraint satisfiability checking and reverse derivation of optimal design solutions. A satellite electric power system (EPS) case study demonstrates the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed approach. The results show that the approach ensures the consistency between system metrics and requirements, and improves automation and completeness of MOE verification within the MBSE framework.
title_zh: 一种基于可满足性模理论的有效性度量形式化验证方法
abstract_zh: 基于模型的系统工程（MBSE）为管理系统设计生命周期中多学科信息提供了一个形式化且集成的框架。在此框架内，有效性度量（MOE）作为评估系统设计是否满足任务需求的关键量化指标。当前在MBSE中验证MOE约束的方法通常依赖于通过SysML参数图建立的数学关系，并利用内置计算插件或外部专用软件进行指标分析。然而，这些方法在多理论混合约束的统一表示、可行解的自动化探索以及工具层面的数据一致性方面面临挑战，从而限制了验证结果的可靠性和完整性。本文提出了一种将多架构建模语言KARMA与可满足性模理论（SMT）相结合的MOE形式化验证方法。该方法为与MOE相关的度量提供了统一的一阶逻辑（FOL）表示，并通过SMT求解器实现对SysML参数图的自动化评估，支持约束可满足性检查及最优设计方案的反向推导。通过对卫星电能系统（EPS）的案例研究，验证了所提方法的可行性与有效性。结果表明，该方法能够确保系统度量与需求之间的一致性，并提升MBSE框架下MOE验证的自动化程度和完整性。

title: Novel Test Framework for Hyperscale Qualification of AI Platforms at Microsoft Azure
authors: Anna Mary Mathew, Michael Chhor, Rigdha Acharya
abstract: As artificial intelligence platforms continue to scale in response to the growing demands of hyperscale cloud environments, the complexity and volume of hardware required to support these systems have increased dramatically. Traditional hardware validation methods—often manual, time-consuming, and limited in scope—are no longer sufficient to detect lowoccurrence, high-impact issues that can compromise production deployments. These elusive faults, which may only surface under specific workloads or environmental conditions, pose a significant risk to system reliability and operational efficiency.This paper introduces a novel, fully automated hyperscale test framework developed by Microsoft Azure to address the unique challenges of AI hardware qualification at scale. Designed to operate across hundreds of systems simultaneously, the framework orchestrates end-to-end workflows including system provisioning, firmware and software updates, test execution, telemetry capture, and result analysis. It leverages cloud-based storage for scalable data retention and integrates with PowerBI dashboards to provide real-time visualization and actionable insights to engineering teams.One of the framework’s key strengths lies in its flexibility. It supports customizable test plans and dynamic configuration options, enabling teams to target specific failure modes or performance bottlenecks. The telemetry pipeline captures granular data across CPU, GPU, memory, and interconnect subsystems, facilitating deep analysis and rapid root cause identification. Compatibility with both Windows and Linux environments ensures broad applicability across diverse hardware platforms and deployment scenarios.By automating the qualification process and embedding intelligence into every stage of the workflow, the framework empowers engineers to detect marginal hardware issues early, optimize system performance, and significantly reduce the risk of costly failures in production datacenters. Its deployment has led to measurable improvements in debug velocity, qualification throughput, and overall system reliability. Moreover, the framework’s modular design allows it to evolve alongside emerging AI workloads and hardware architectures, making it a future-proof solution for hyperscale validation.This work sets a new benchmark for AI hardware qualification, demonstrating how cloud-native automation and telemetry-driven analysis can transform traditional validation paradigms. It offers a compelling blueprint for other hyperscale providers seeking to enhance reliability, reduce operational risk, and accelerate innovation in the AI hardware space.
title_zh: 用于在微软Azure上对AI平台进行超大规模认证的新型测试框架
abstract_zh:
随着人工智能平台为满足超大规模云环境日益增长的需求而不断扩展，支撑这些系统所需的硬件复杂性和数量已急剧增加。传统的硬件验证方法——通常依赖人工、耗时且覆盖范围有限——已无法充分检测那些发生频率低但影响重大的问题，而这些问题可能破坏生产环境的部署。这些难以捉摸的故障往往只在特定工作负载或环境条件下才会显现，对系统的可靠性与运行效率构成重大风险。

本文介绍了一种由微软Azure开发的全新全自动化超大规模测试框架，旨在应对大规模AI硬件认证所面临的独特挑战。该框架设计可同时在数百套系统上运行，协调端到端的工作流程，包括系统配置、固件与软件更新、测试执行、遥测数据采集以及结果分析。它利用基于云的存储实现可扩展的数据保留，并集成PowerBI仪表板，为工程团队提供实时可视化和可操作的洞察。

该框架的关键优势之一在于其灵活性。它支持可定制的测试计划和动态配置选项，使团队能够针对特定的故障模式或性能瓶颈进行精准测试。遥测管道可采集CPU、GPU、内存和互连子系统等各个层面的细粒度数据，支持深入分析并快速定位根本原因。同时，框架兼容Windows和Linux环境，确保其在多种硬件平台和部署场景中具有广泛适用性。

通过将认证过程自动化，并在工作流的每个阶段嵌入智能分析能力，该框架使工程师能够在早期发现边缘性硬件问题，优化系统性能，并显著降低生产数据中心发生高成本故障的风险。该框架的部署已在调试速度、认证吞吐量和整体系统可靠性方面带来可衡量的提升。此外，其模块化设计使其能够随新兴AI工作负载和硬件架构的发展而持续演进，成为面向未来的超大规模验证解决方案。

本研究为AI硬件认证设立了新标杆，展示了云原生自动化与遥测驱动分析如何彻底改变传统验证范式。它为其他超大规模服务提供商提供了极具参考价值的蓝图，助力其在AI硬件领域提升可靠性、降低运营风险并加速创新。
